title: スプリングSの後に・いつもと違う想い

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Ah, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Ah, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I'm exhausted... Shower me with a little more praise, will you?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, just kidding! I've got an interview coming
up, so I've still got to push myself a little longer!
choice_data_list: And next up is the Satsuki Sho!
And next up is the Satsuki Sho!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh, snap! Yeah, that's right!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It's a doozy of a race—it'll be so exciting! Let's do
everything we can to prepare for the Satsuki Sho!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Okay then, I'm off to the interview.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the Spring Stakes, the prelude to the
Classics, comes to an end.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That night...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Is that... Maruzensky's trainer?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wow, you're working so late! You must be tired!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: ...Ack! Oh, no—that was supposed to be secret!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You didn't see anything, okay? I'll get in trouble
if anyone finds out I've been running this late!
choice_data_list: Don't push yourself too hard, okay?
Don't push yourself too hard, okay?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: O-okay! Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe... I really do enjoy running. Little by little, I
really feel like I'm getting better.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'm even getting closer to running with someone
like Maruzensky...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Next up is the Satsuki Sho, isn't it? I'm sure it's
going to be an incredible race!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Grass and I are looking forward to watching
Maruzensky run, so please tell her to really go for
it!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Great! Okay, good night!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The young student, chasing after her role model...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems so happy as she walks away. It's a stark
contrast to how Maruzensky has been recently...
